title: Protein Intake Calculator - Daily Protein Needs
description: Free protein intake calculator. Find your optimal daily protein requirement based on weight, activity level, and fitness goals.
keywords: protein intake calculator, daily protein needs, protein per day, protein requirement, muscle building protein
intro: Calculate your recommended daily protein intake based on your body weight, activity level, and goals.

faq.q: How much protein do I need per day?
faq.a: Sedentary adults need about 0.8g/kg. Active individuals need 1.2-1.7g/kg, and those building muscle may need up to 2.2g/kg.

faq.q: Can I eat too much protein?
faq.a: For healthy individuals, up to 2.2g/kg is generally safe. Those with kidney issues should consult a doctor about protein limits.
Lean meats, fish, eggs, dairy, legumes, tofu, and protein supplements are all excellent sources.
